skillleveling.command.get_help: Use /skillleveling get to see your skill levels
skillleveling.command.set_help: Use /skillleveling set to modify skill levels
skillleveling.command.advance_help: Use /skillleveling advance to advance skill levels
skillleveling.command.refund_help: Use /skillleveling refund <one|multiple|all> to refund skill levels
skillleveling.command.player_only: This command can only be used by players
item.puffish_skill_leveling.tome_of_prog: Grants +1 Level to a Skill Tree
item.puffish_skill_leveling.tome_of_grea: Refund any number of levels from a skill
item.puffish_skill_leveling.skill_tome.d: "Another man's knowledge is another man's power."
skillleveling.tome.already_max: Category is already at max level!
skillleveling.tome.already_at_level: §cYou are already at or above level %d!
skillleveling.tome.no_experience: This Skill Tree does not use experience levels!
skillleveling.tome.max_level: You are already at the maximum level!
skillleveling.tome.invalid: §cThis Skill Tome is invalid or unconfigured.
skillleveling.tome.imbue_required: §cThis skill must be imbued into equipment. Use an anvil to apply it.
skillleveling.tome.learn_fail: §cFailed to learn the skill. Prerequisites may not be met.
skillleveling.refund.blocked_by_prereq: Cannot refund: the following skills depend on this and must be refunded first: %s
item.puffish_skill_leveling.sigil_of_imb: Opens a skill slot on equipment (max 3)
item.puffish_skill_leveling.tome_of_clea: Extract an imbued skill from equipment
skillleveling.cleansing.no_skills: This equipment has no imbued skills.
skillleveling.imbue.no_slots: No empty skill slots available. Use a Sigil of Imbuement first.
skillleveling.imbue.max_slots: Equipment already has maximum skill slots.
block.puffish_skill_leveling.skill_scrib: The Skill Master can help you here...
